zh.lifeSummary: John Handscombe於1380年出生在英國英格蘭戴文易亞斯特 唐。他於1404年與Mrs. John Handscombe在英國英格蘭戴文易亞斯特 唐結婚。他們至少是1個女兒的父母。

nameMeanings.name: Handscombe
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016
meanings: English: variant of Hanscombe with intrusive -d-.

variants.name: Hanscombe
meanings: English: locative name from Hanscombe End in Shillington (Beds).

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of   John  , also used quite frequently in the English-speaking world. In Northern Ireland it is sometimes found as a variant of   Ewan .

en.lifeSummary: John Handscombe was born in 1380, in East Down, Devon, England, United Kingdom. He married Mrs. John Handscombe in 1404, in East Down, Devon, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 daughter.

ko.lifeSummary: John Handscombe(은)는 1380년 영국 잉글랜드 데폰 이스트 다운에서 태어났다. 그는 1404년 영국 잉글랜드 데폰 이스트 다운에서 Mrs. John Handscombe(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 딸을 두었다.
